description_long: This is a tall, rectangular whisky box with a deep burgundy color and ornate gold decorative patterns on all sides. The front face prominently displays the brand name 'LA ESPERA' in large gold letters, with a smaller script below and a gold-embellished area at the top. The sides and back are adorned with intricate gold filigree designs, with the back featuring a block of descriptive text and a barcode at the bottom. One side includes four gold-embellished icons with accompanying text, likely describing product features or instructions. The box appears to be made of sturdy cardboard, designed to house a bottle of whisky securely. The overall appearance is elegant and luxurious, suitable for premium spirits.
description: A tall, burgundy whisky box with ornate gold patterns and prominent 'LA ESPERA' branding, exuding a luxurious and premium feel.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'LA ESPERA' branding in gold, a decorative gold panel at the top, and intricate gold filigree covering most of the surface.
description_view_1: This side view features a full gold filigree pattern and a small section of text near the bottom, with less branding than the front.
description_view_2: The back view displays the 'LA ESPERA' name, a large block of descriptive text, gold filigree at the top and bottom, and a barcode at the bottom.
description_view_3: This side view highlights four gold-embellished icons with short text descriptions, bordered by gold filigree at the top and bottom.
attribute_label_or_branding: The front face features 'LA ESPERA' in large gold serif letters, with a smaller script below and a gold decorative panel at the top. The back has 'LA ESPERA' in gold, a block of descriptive text in white or gold, and a barcode at the bottom. One side has four gold-embellished icons with short text, and the other side has a gold filigree pattern with a small text section. All text and branding are in gold, using elegant serif and script fonts.
